Title: The "Passive Income" trap ate a generation of entrepreneurs
Description:
I had coffee last year with a guy - I won't use his real name - who told me he was "building a business." I asked what it did. Dropshipping jade face rollers.

I made him say it twice.

Jade face rollers.

He'd found them on Alibaba for $1.20

Title: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B on my laptop drew me a better pelican than Claude Opus 4.7
Description: For anyone who has been (inadvisably) taking my pelican riding a bicycle benchmark seriously as a robust way to test models, here are pelicans from this morning’s two big model …
